info.title: Self-Questioning Agent Pipeline Service
info.description: HTTP API to submit and monitor pipeline execution jobs

post.description:
Submit a new pipeline job.

Returns a job_id immediately. The pipeline runs in the background.
Use GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id} to check progress.

get.description: Get the status and logs of a pipeline job.
List all pipeline jobs, optionally filtered by status.
Get full logs for a pipeline job.

post.description:
Run the pipeline synchronously (blocks until completion).

WARNING: This endpoint blocks the worker thread until the pipeline finishes.
Use /api/pipeline/submit for async execution in production.

start_stage.title: Start Stage
start_stage.description: Which stage to start from (1, 2, or 3)

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If True, only print commands without executing

train_eval_flag.title: Train Eval Flag
train_eval_flag.description: Train/eval flag for stage 1 data source

dry_run_import.title: Dry Run Import
dry_run_import.description: If True, stage 3 import runs in dry-run mode (preview only)

PipelineRequest.title: PipelineRequest
PipelineRequest.description: Request body for submitting a pipeline job.

PipelineTaskInfo.title: PipelineTaskInfo
PipelineTaskInfo.description: Response model for a pipeline task.
